title: Glowing Mushrooms
description: a mod that adds glowing mushrooms to the game
body:
Step into a magical world with the Glowing Mushrooms mod!

Discover Bioluminescent Mushrooms:
Glowing mushrooms now spawn naturally in Forests, Dark Forests, Birch Forests, and even in caves. Their radiant glow lights up the environment, making exploration enchanting and safe.

Craft Glowing Mushroom Soup:
Combine a red mushroom, brown mushroom, a glowing mushroom, and a bowl to create Glowing Mushroom Soup. This magical soup grants three unique effects:

Glowing: Illuminates the player.
Gleaming: A new effect that enhances your visibility and brilliance.
Night Vision: Perfect for nighttime adventures or cave exploration.
Brew the Potion of Gleaming:
Harness the power of glowing mushrooms to craft a new potion type:

Potion of Gleaming
Splash Potion of Gleaming
Lingering Potion of Gleaming
Arrow of Gleaming
Bring light to the darkest corners of your world and enchant your adventures with this glowing new addition!
